mapper.select: SELECT t.task_id AS taskId, p.project_title AS projectTitle, tt.type_name AS typeName, cc.default_describe AS defaultDescribe, t.priority AS priority, t.task_title AS taskTitle, t.task_progress AS taskProgress, u.user_name AS taskManager, t.created_at AS createdAt, t.finish_date AS finishDate, t.project_id AS projectId FROM task t INNER JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.project_id INNER JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id INNER JOIN common_code cc ON t.task_status = cc.common_id LEFT JOIN users u ON t.task_manager = u.user_code WHERE t.project_id = #{pId} AND deleted_yn ='N' ORDER BY createdAt DESC
SELECT type_id AS typeId, type_name AS typeName FROM task_types WHERE company_id = #{cId}
SELECT common_id AS commonId, default_describe AS defaultDescribe FROM common_code WHERE common_code = '0E'
SELECT u.user_code AS userCode, u.email AS email, u.user_name AS userName FROM members m INNER JOIN users u ON m.user_code = u.user_code WHERE m.project_id = #{pId}
SELECT task_id AS taskId, task_title AS taskTitle FROM task WHERE parent_task_id IS NULL AND project_id = #{pId}
SELECT task_priority_id AS priorityId, priority_name AS priorityName FROM task_priority WHERE company_id = #{cId} AND using_yn = 'Y'
SELECT milestone_id, milestone_title FROM milestone WHERE project_id = #{pId} AND milestone_status = 'g1'
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'TSK-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDD') || '_' || (SELECT NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(task_id, 12))), 0) + 1 FROM task WHERE task_id LIKE 'TSK-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDD') || '_%') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO task ( task_id, task_title, task_describe, task_status, priority, task_manager, start_date, finish_date, estimated_time, task_progress, parent_task_id, spent_hours_sum, created_at, milestone_id, project_id, user_code, type_id ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{taskTitle}, #{taskDescribe, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskStatus}, #{priority}, #{taskManager, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{finishDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{estimatedTime}, #{taskProgress}, (SELECT MAX(task_id) FROM task WHERE task_title = #{parentTaskTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 0, SYSDATE + 9/24, #{milestoneId}, #{projectId}, #{userCode}, (SELECT MAX(type_id) FROM task_types WHERE type_name = #{typeIdName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) )
mapper.select:
SELECT t.task_id AS taskId, t.task_title AS taskTitle, t.task_describe AS taskDescribe, c.default_describe AS taskStatus, t.task_status AS taskStatusId, t.priority, u_mgr.user_name AS taskManager, t.task_manager AS taskManagerId, t.start_date AS startDate, t.finish_date AS finishDate, t.estimated_time AS estimatedTime, t.task_progress AS taskProgress, t.parent_task_id AS parentTaskId, p.task_title AS parentTaskTitle, t.spent_hours_sum AS spentHoursSum, t.created_at AS createdAt, t.updated_at AS updatedAt, t.milestone_id AS milestoneId, m.milestone_title AS milestoneTitle, t.project_id AS projectId, u_writer.user_name AS taskWriter, tt.type_name AS typeIdName,
f.file_id AS fileId, f.logical_name AS logicalName, fv.version_number AS versionNumber, fv.file_size AS fileSize, fv.uploaded_at AS uploadedAt
FROM task t JOIN common_code c ON t.task_status = c.common_id JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id LEFT JOIN task p ON t.parent_task_id = p.task_id LEFT JOIN milestone m ON t.milestone_id = m.milestone_id LEFT JOIN users u_mgr ON t.task_manager = u_mgr.user_code LEFT JOIN users u_writer ON t.user_code = u_writer.user_code
LEFT JOIN files f ON t.task_id = f.task_id AND f.is_deleted = 'N'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT file_id, version_number, file_size, uploaded_at, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY file_id ORDER BY version_number DESC) AS rn FROM file_versions ) fv ON f.file_id = fv.file_id AND fv.rn = 1 WHERE t.task_id = #{tId}

SELECT p.project_title AS projectTitle, tt.type_name AS typeName, cc.default_describe AS defaultDescribe, t.priority AS priority, t.task_title AS taskTitle, t.task_progress AS taskProgress, u.user_name AS taskManager, t.created_at AS createdAt, t.finish_date AS finishDate FROM task t INNER JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.project_id INNER JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id INNER JOIN common_code cc ON t.task_status = cc.common_id LEFT JOIN users u ON t.task_manager = u.user_code WHERE t.task_manager = #{tManager} AND deleted_yn ='N' ORDER BY createdAt DESC
SELECT m.project_id , p.project_title FROM members m JOIN project p ON m.project_id = p.project_id WHERE m.user_code = #{uCode} AND deleted_yn ='N'
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET type_id = (SELECT MAX(type_id) FROM task_types WHERE type_name = #{typeIdName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), task_title = #{taskTitle}, task_describe = #{taskDescribe, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_status = #{taskStatus}, priority = #{priority}, task_manager = #{taskManager, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_date = #{startDate, jdbcType=DATE}, finish_date = #{finishDate, jdbcType=DATE}, estimated_time = #{estimatedTime}, task_progress = #{taskProgress}, milestone_id = #{milestoneId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_at = SYSDATE + 9/24, parent_task_id = #{parentTaskId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT tc.comment_id AS commentId , tc.task_id taskId, tc.parent_comment_id parentCommentId, tc.user_code userCode, u.user_name userName, u.profile_image profileImage, tc.task_comment taskComment, tc.created_at AS createdAt FROM task_comment tc JOIN users u ON tc.user_code = u.user_code WHERE task_id = #{tId} ORDER BY tc.comment_id ASC
